modules.module_title: Introduction to Customer Service, Customer Empathy & Active Listening
Professional Telephone Etiquette, Tele-Calling & Customer Relationship Management
Written Customer Communication: Emails, Chats, Messaging & Live Chat Etiquette
De-escalating Angry Customers, Conflict Resolution & Recovery Strategies
Feedback Collection, Net Promoter Score (NPS) & Customer Loyalty
Professional Ethics, Personal Accountability & Customer Experience Business

questions.question: Customer Service Excellence ka primary objective kya hota hai?

options.A: Customers ke issues ko identify karke unhe politely, fast aur satisfactory solution provide karna
options.B: Only cutting costs by ignoring customer calls
options.C: Creating software database codes in IT department

questions.explanation: Customer service agents ka primary role customer expectations meet karna, brand trust maintain rakhna aur retention high rakhna hota hai.

questions.question: Customer interactions me 'Empathy' (sahanubhati) show karne ka actual meaning kya hai?

options.A: Customer ki problem aur situational feelings ko unke perspective se understand karna aur validate karna
options.B: Offering customer discounts without solving their core problems
options.C: Arguing that company policies are always correct
options.D: Talking very fast so customer gets confused

questions.explanation: Empathy customer ko valued feel karati hai aur issue resolution time par support building block banati hai.

questions.question: Customer calls handling me 'Hold protocol' safety checks rules me holding period guidelines?

options.A: Ask customer permission before hold, state hold reason, and check back every 45-60 seconds
options.B: Keep caller on silent hold for 20 minutes directly
options.C: Disconnect line if processing takes time

questions.explanation: Mute hold bina rules details update kare customer frustation ko high kar deta hai, regular updates satisfy client check limits.

questions.question: Customer metrics me 'First Contact Resolution' (FCR) kya signify karta hai?

options.A: Customer issue ka first single call/chat session me hi fully resolve hona (zero follow-up sessions needed)
options.B: Calling customer daily for payments verification
options.C: Greeting the customer first before they speak

questions.explanation: High FCR operational cost reduce karta hai aur customer satisfaction levels instantly double up karta hai.

questions.question: Customer recovery processes checks me 'LAST Method' me 'A' kya represent karta hai?

options.A: Apologize (sincere aur polite apology for inconvenience caused)
options.B: Action (immediate dispatch logs)
options.C: Attitude (strict posture checks)

questions.explanation: LAST framework (Listen, Apologize, Solve, Thank) customer recovery steps ka baseline guide mana jata hai.

questions.question: Live Chat support systems checks me 'Canned Responses' kya represent karti hain?

options.A: Pre-written template text messages used to answer frequently asked questions quickly
options.B: Automated voice voicemail alerts
options.C: Spam promotional advertisements links

questions.explanation: Canned responses typing efforts save karti hain aur common queries (eg return policy, refund status) instant resolved karti hain.

questions.question: Customer feedback loops checks me 'NPS' (Net Promoter Score) kya measure karta hai?

options.A: Likelihood of customers recommending company products to friends/colleagues (scores 0 to 10 scale)
options.B: Total website views per day
options.C: Average call durations minutes count

questions.explanation: NPS loyalty metric hai. Promoters (9-10 score), Passives (7-8 score) aur Detractors (0-6 score) categorize karta hai.

questions.question: Customer interaction conflicts me, if customer starts shouting using abusive words, what is agent response?

options.A: Stay calm, do not raise voice, politely set boundaries ('I want to help you, but please avoid abusive language'), and escalate to supervisor if behavior continues
options.B: Shout back using similar abusive words to protect self respect
options.C: Disconnect call instantly without warning statements
options.D: Agree to all fake demands immediately out of fear

questions.explanation: Calm and professional tone escalations prevent situations from turning worse, establishing service ethics boundaries.

questions.question: Customer support documentation loops checks me 'CRM' systems ka primary use kya hota hai?

options.A: Customer interaction history, tickets tracking aur purchase profiles details update and store karna
options.B: Calculating local office electricity taxes
options.C: Managing staff attendance sheet logs

questions.explanation: Customer Relationship Management (CRM) databases agents ko client context logs check karne me help karte hain during repeat runs.

questions.question: Professional customer service ethics checks me client personal information (credit cards, phone number) security guidelines?

options.A: Strictly encrypt card entries, never write customer passwords in open text file diaries, and follow GDPR/PCI rules
options.B: Share client telephone directories publicly on open blogs
options.C: Sell customer data to advertisement agencies for profit margins

questions.explanation: Data security guidelines customer financial interests protect karte hain, keeping center compliant to legal standards.

questions.question: Customer service vocabulary checks 'SLA' what does it stand for?

options.A: Service Level Agreement (time bounds/quality commitments promised to client)
options.B: Sales Ledger Account
options.C: Standard Loyalty Audit

questions.explanation: SLA defined response times metrics define karta hai (eg email replies within 4 hours), guaranteeing service delivery speed.

questions.question: Written customer chat support etiquette 'Emoticons usage' what is recommended rule?

options.A: Use sparingly and only if customer uses them first (keep tone professional, avoid excessive smileys)
options.B: Use 10 smileys in every single sentence to look friendly
options.C: Emoticons are strictly banned in all chats hamesha

questions.explanation: Excessive emoji counts make official company replies look childish. Selective usage builds clean visual connections.

questions.question: Customer behavior checks 'Churn Rate' what does Churn signify?

options.A: Percentage of customers who stop doing business with company over a defined period
options.B: Total count of new users acquired daily
options.C: Average time taken to package order boxes

questions.explanation: High churn rates alert company to customer service quality issues. Lowering churn raises lifetime value metrics.

questions.question: Customer inquiries handling 'Active validation statements' which sentence shows active support?

options.A: 'I understand how frustrating this must be, let's fix it together right away.'
options.B: 'Your issue is typical, wait for your turn.'
options.C: 'I cannot solve this without supervisor approval.'

questions.explanation: Using ownership phrases ('let's fix it together...') eases customer distress, converting angry callers to loyal fans.

questions.question: Customer service agency bookkeepings 'Refund log books' why tracking is strict?

options.A: Prevents double payouts errors, tracking financial leakages and validating customer refund status
options.B: Required by Google AdSense codes
options.C: Saves room space in warehouse stores

questions.explanation: Strict refund logs protect company assets, checking that each cash return maps back to verified invoices.

options.A: Customers ke issues ko identify karke unhe politely, fast aur satisfactory solution provide karna
options.B: Only cutting costs by ignoring customer calls
options.C: Creating software database codes in IT department

questions.explanation: Customer service agents ka primary role customer expectations meet karna, brand trust maintain rakhna aur retention high rakhna hota hai.

options.B: Total count of new users acquired daily

questions.explanation: High churn rates alert company to customer service quality issues. Lowering churn raises lifetime value metrics.

options.B: 'Your issue is typical, wait for your turn.'

questions.explanation: Using ownership phrases ('let's fix it together...') eases customer distress, converting angry callers to loyal fans.

options.C: Saves room space in warehouse stores

questions.question: Customer service structures 'Ombudsman role' what is its function?

options.A: Independent public officer who investigates customer complaints against company administration failures
options.B: Main sales director of corporation
options.C: Security officer in charge of building

questions.explanation: Ombudsman acts as impartial mediator, reviewing disputed cases to ensure fair resolutions for customers.

questions.question: Customer service metrics 'CSAT score' what does it measure?

options.A: Customer Satisfaction Score (average score of survey queries like 'How satisfied were you today?')
options.B: Company Sales and Taxes accounts
options.C: Call Center Attendance tracker

questions.explanation: CSAT is basic customer metric evaluating transactional satisfaction immediately after service delivery.

questions.question: Customer communication channels 'Multichannel vs Omnichannel' what characterizes Omnichannel?

options.A: Seamless integration of all channels (email, phone, chat) so customer journey history carries over across them
options.B: Using only one channel for all communications
options.C: Banning email support completely

questions.explanation: Omnichannel syncs data across platforms; a client starting on chat can resolve issues over phone without repeating facts.

questions.question: Customer feedback analysis 'Sentiment analysis' what does it scan?

options.A: Scans customer email text words to evaluate emotional tone (positive, neutral, negative)
options.B: Calculates total weight of mail packages
options.C: Measures total letters count in text

questions.explanation: NLP systems use sentiment scores to prioritize angry/negative client mails, flagging them for immediate response.

questions.question: Service center operations 'Escalation matrix' why defined?

options.A: Outlines clear path of command if junior agents cannot resolve a customer issue (Tier 1 to Tier 2/3)
options.B: Required by regional taxation laws
options.C: Required by Google AdSense algorithms

questions.explanation: Matrix limits delay loops by routing complex issues to experienced managers, preserving SLAs.

questions.question: Ombudsman customer complaint mediator?

options.A: Independent public officer who investigates customer complaints against company administration failures
options.B: Main sales director of corporation
options.C: Security officer in charge of building

questions.explanation: Ombudsman acts as impartial mediator, reviewing disputed cases to ensure fair resolutions for customers.

questions.explanation: CSAT is basic customer metric evaluating transactional satisfaction immediately after service delivery.

options.B: Calculates total weight of mail packages
options.C: Measures total letters count in text

questions.explanation: NLP systems use sentiment scores to prioritize angry/negative client mails, flagging them for immediate response.

questions.question: Escalation matrix Tier 1 Tier 2?

options.A: Outlines clear path of command if junior agents cannot resolve a customer issue (Tier 1 to Tier 2/3)
options.B: Required by regional taxation laws
options.C: Required by Google AdSense algorithms

questions.explanation: Matrix limits delay loops by routing complex issues to experienced managers, preserving SLAs.

questions.question: Customer support communications 'Mirroring' what is mirroring technique?

options.A: Adapting to the customer's communication style, pace, and vocabulary tone (helps build rapport)
options.B: Holding a glass mirror in front of computer monitor screen
options.C: Repeating the customer's sentences exactly word for word

questions.explanation: Mirroring matches customer pacing; if a client writes formal concise mails, reply with formal bullet points to align communication expectations.

questions.question: Customer service standards 'CES score' what does it measure?

options.A: Customer Effort Score (measures how easy it was for customer to resolve their issue)
options.B: Company Employee Salary score
options.C: Customer Entry Security system

questions.explanation: CES measures customer effort (eg low effort = high satisfaction), which is a key predictor of client loyalty.

questions.question: Call center operations 'AHT metrics' what does AHT stand for?

options.A: Average Handle Time (total talk time + hold time + post-call work wrap duration)
options.B: Average Holiday Time
options.C: Annual Hiring Target

questions.explanation: AHT is a key call center efficiency metric, tracking the average duration of customer interactions.

questions.question: De-escalation tactics 'Agreeing with facts' how agent validates customer complaint?

options.A: 'You are right, the delivery did not arrive on Monday as promised.' (agrees with facts, defuses anger)
options.B: 'It is not our mistake that the courier delivery failed.'
options.C: 'Please do not complain about shipping issues.'

questions.explanation: Acknowledging facts builds trust, showing the client that the company takes accountability for issues.

questions.question: Customer support logistics 'Knowledge Base' why are self-service articles created?

options.A: Empowers customers to find answers independently, reducing incoming support ticket volumes
options.B: Required by regional library laws
options.C: Required by Google AdSense algorithms

questions.explanation: A self-service knowledge base helps clients resolve common queries quickly without waiting for an agent.

questions.question: Customer service dynamics 'Customer Lifetime Value' (CLV) what does it measure?

options.A: Total revenue a business can expect from a single customer account throughout their relationship
options.B: Total count of website clicks per customer
options.C: Average time taken to answer phone requests

questions.explanation: CLV measures customer value over time, highlighting the financial benefits of retention and support programs.

questions.question: Support center operations 'Abandonment Rate' what does it measure in call queues?

options.A: Percentage of callers who hang up the phone before reaching a support agent
options.B: Percentage of agents who arrive late for work shifts
options.C: Total count of tickets closed in a day

questions.explanation: High abandonment rates signal long queue waits, prompting managers to optimize staff numbers.

questions.question: Customer support loops 'CRM system triggers' what happens when a ticket SLA is breached?

options.A: Automatically escalates ticket to senior manager, raising support priority
options.B: Deletes the ticket from database automatically
options.C: Sends bill invoices to customer directly

questions.explanation: Automated SLA alerts prevent unresolved issues from being ignored, keeping the team aligned with commitments.

questions.question: De-escalation mechanics 'The CARP Method' what does C-A-R-P stand for?

options.A: Control, Acknowledge, Refocus, Problem-solve (structured de-escalation method)
options.B: Cost, Attendance, Review, Payroll
options.C: Client, Agent, Response, Product

questions.explanation: CARP guides agents through emotional customer interactions, helping them de-escalate tension and resolve issues.

questions.question: Customer service operations 'Customer Feedback Loop' what is final step of closed-loop feedback?

options.A: Contacting customer to show what action was taken based on their feedback details
options.B: Filing the feedback sheet in archives lockbox
options.C: Required by Google AdSense algorithms

questions.explanation: Closing the loop with customers show they are valued, boosting brand loyalty and retention.

options.B: Total count of website clicks per customer

options.B: Filing the feedback sheet in archives lockbox
options.C: Required by Google AdSense algorithms

questions.explanation: Closing the loop with customers show they are valued, boosting brand loyalty and retention.

questions.question: Customer service standards 'Service Recovery Paradox' what does it define?

options.A: A customer feels higher loyalty after an issue is successfully resolved than if no problem occurred at all
options.B: Resolving complaints costs more than losing customers
options.C: Loyal customers complain more than new customers

questions.explanation: Resolving issues quickly and empathetically builds trust, leaving the customer more loyal than before the problem.

questions.question: Written communications 'Formatting email replies' what is the best paragraph limit for easy scanning?

options.A: Max 3-4 sentences per paragraph, using bullet points for instructions (avoids dense blocks)
options.B: One long continuous text block of 50 lines
options.C: Using large capital letters in every word
options.D: Email paragraphs do not require formatting

questions.explanation: Short paragraphs and bullet points make emails easy to scan on mobile screens, improving readability.

questions.question: Customer service metrics 'First Response Time' (FRT) why is it tracked?

options.A: Measures how long customer waits before receiving their first reply, indicating response speed
options.B: Measures how many hours agent sleeps during shift
options.C: Calculates total postage stamp costs

questions.explanation: Low FRT scores reassure customers that their complaints are being processed, preventing repeat contact loops.

questions.question: Customer support loops 'Handling ticket transfers' how to introduce the transfer politely?

options.A: 'I will connect you with our shipping specialist, Mr. Das. I have shared your details with him.'
options.B: 'Wait while I transfer this ticket to another department.'
options.C: 'Ask Mr. Das yourself.'

questions.explanation: Sharing customer context with the next agent prevents the client from having to repeat their story, streamlining resolutions.

questions.question: Service centers operations 'FCR vs CSAT correlations' what trends occur when FCR rises?

options.A: CSAT scores rise because customers get issues resolved in a single session
options.B: CSAT scores fall as FCR rises
options.C: FCR has no impact on customer satisfaction CSAT

questions.explanation: Resolving issues in a single interaction (high FCR) eliminates follow-up effort, directly boosting CSAT scores.

questions.question: Service Recovery Paradox higher loyalty?

options.A: A customer feels higher loyalty after an issue is successfully resolved than if no problem occurred at all
options.B: Resolving complaints costs more than losing customers
options.C: Loyal customers complain more than new customers

questions.explanation: Resolving issues quickly and empathetically builds trust, leaving the customer more loyal than before the problem.

questions.explanation: Short paragraphs and bullet points make emails easy to scan on mobile screens, improving readability.

options.B: CSAT scores fall as FCR rises
options.C: FCR has no impact on customer satisfaction CSAT

questions.explanation: Resolving issues in a single interaction (high FCR) eliminates follow-up effort, directly boosting CSAT scores.

questions.question: Customer service standards 'The Golden Rule' what does it state?

options.A: Treat customers the way you would like to be treated as a customer yourself
options.B: Customer is always correct, even if they commit fraud
options.C: Maximize profits from every single contact session

questions.explanation: The Golden Rule encourages empathy and respect, serving as the foundation of customer service excellence.

questions.question: Written customer chat support 'Punctuation guidelines' what is professional tone?

options.A: Use proper capitalization and single exclamation points (never use multiple !!! or capital SCREAMING letters)
options.B: Use all capital letters to display urgency
options.C: Omit punctuation completely to speed up typing
options.D: Punctuation has no impact on tone

questions.explanation: Writing in all caps looks like shouting (screaming), while multiple exclamation marks look unprofessional. Clean, standard punctuation is best.

questions.question: Customer support loops 'Handling unresolved tickets' what status is assigned?

options.A: Open / Pending (indicating active resolution steps are still in progress)
options.B: Closed / Resolved
options.C: Deleted / Erased
options.D: Tickets do not have status tracking

questions.explanation: Keeping unresolved tickets in 'Open' or 'Pending' status ensures they are tracked and resolved, preventing SLA breaches.

questions.question: De-escalation tactics 'The HEAR Method' what does H-E-A-R stand for?

options.A: Hear, Empathize, Apologize, Resolve (structured de-escalation method)
options.B: Help, Escalate, Answer, Review
options.C: Hold, Edit, Archive, Report

questions.explanation: The HEAR method provides a step-by-step approach for handling emotional customer interactions.

questions.question: Service center operations 'Agent burnout prevention' what strategy is monitored by managers?

options.A: Scheduled breaks, balanced ticket allocations, and regular support reviews
options.B: Forcing agents to work 16-hour shifts without breaks
options.C: Lowering agent hourly payout rates
options.D: Burnout does not occur in customer service

questions.explanation: Managing agent workloads and providing scheduled breaks helps prevent burnout, reducing turnover and maintaining service quality.

questions.question: Golden Rule treat customer?

options.A: Treat customers the way you would like to be treated as a customer yourself
options.B: Customer is always correct, even if they commit fraud
options.C: Maximize profits from every single contact session

questions.explanation: The Golden Rule encourages empathy and respect, serving as the foundation of customer service excellence.

options.A: Use proper capitalization and single exclamation points (never use multiple !!! or capital SCREAMING letters)
options.B: Use all capital letters to display urgency
options.C: Omit punctuation completely to speed up typing
options.D: Punctuation has no impact on tone

questions.explanation: Writing in all caps looks like shouting (screaming), while multiple exclamation marks look unprofessional. Clean, standard punctuation is best.

questions.question: Unresolved tickets pending open status?

options.A: Open / Pending (indicating active resolution steps are still in progress)
options.B: Closed / Resolved
options.C: Deleted / Erased
options.D: Tickets do not have status tracking

questions.explanation: Keeping unresolved tickets in 'Open' or 'Pending' status ensures they are tracked and resolved, preventing SLA breaches.

questions.question: HEAR method Hear Empathize Apologize?

options.A: Hear, Empathize, Apologize, Resolve (structured de-escalation method)
options.B: Help, Escalate, Answer, Review
options.C: Hold, Edit, Archive, Report

questions.explanation: The HEAR method provides a step-by-step approach for handling emotional customer interactions.

questions.question: Agent burnout prevention breaks ticket balance?

options.A: Scheduled breaks, balanced ticket allocations, and regular support reviews
options.B: Forcing agents to work 16-hour shifts without breaks
options.C: Lowering agent hourly payout rates
options.D: Burnout does not occur in customer service

questions.explanation: Managing agent workloads and providing scheduled breaks helps prevent burnout, reducing turnover and maintaining service quality.

questions.question: Customer service structures 'Tiered Support systems' what is Tier 1 support team role?

options.A: Handling basic general queries and password resets (escalating complex issues to Tier 2/3)
options.B: Writing software code bugs fixes directly
options.C: Setting corporate annual budget policies

questions.explanation: Tier 1 acts as frontline support, handling simple queries and routing complex cases to technical teams.

questions.question: Written communication 'Opening greetings' what is standard email opening for corporate clients?

options.A: 'Dear Mr. Shah,' or 'Dear Client Name,' (avoiding overly casual greetings like 'Hey Shah!')
options.B: 'Yo Shah!'
options.C: 'To Whom It May Concern' always
options.D: No greetings are used in emails

questions.explanation: Using standard greetings (Dear + Mr./Ms. + Surname) maintains professional tone and business boundaries.

questions.question: Customer support loops 'Handling customer reviews' how should agent reply to a 1-star public review?

options.A: Acknowledge the issue publicly, apologize politely, and invite customer to contact support directly to resolve it
options.B: Ignore the review completely
options.C: Argue with the customer publicly to defend the brand
options.D: Delete or hide the review secretly

questions.explanation: A polite public response shows prospective clients that the company takes accountability and values feedback.

questions.question: De-escalation tactics 'Active Listening validations' what phrase shows you are listening to customer details?

options.A: 'Yes, I understand you spent 2 hours trying to resolve this, let's fix it.'
options.B: 'I hear you, please repeat your account number first.'
options.C: 'Calm down.'

questions.explanation: Paraphrasing their issue validates their experience, showing the customer that you are listening and understanding.

questions.question: Customer experience business 'Net Promoter System' what score defines Passives?

options.A: 7 or 8 (satisfied but unenthusiastic customers who can switch to competitors)
options.B: 9 or 10
options.C: 0 to 6
options.D: Passives are not scored in NPS

questions.explanation: Passives score 7-8; they are satisfied but lack loyalty, making them vulnerable to competitor pricing offers.

options.B: Writing software code bugs fixes directly
options.C: Setting corporate annual budget policies

questions.explanation: Tier 1 acts as frontline support, handling simple queries and routing complex cases to technical teams.

options.C: 'To Whom It May Concern' always
options.D: No greetings are used in emails

questions.explanation: Using standard greetings (Dear + Mr./Ms. + Surname) maintains professional tone and business boundaries.

options.C: Argue with the customer publicly to defend the brand
options.D: Delete or hide the review secretly

questions.explanation: A polite public response shows prospective clients that the company takes accountability and values feedback.

options.B: 'I hear you, please repeat your account number first.'
options.C: 'Calm down.'

questions.explanation: Paraphrasing their issue validates their experience, showing the customer that you are listening and understanding.

questions.question: Customer Service Excellence final launch audits why mock call assessment is key final step?

options.A: Verifies agent response pacing, clear phone greetings and CRM record update accuracies
options.B: Video editing file sizes compression
options.C: Subtitles translate tools automatic

questions.explanation: Running final mock calls evaluates tone and problem-solving speed, verifying readiness to handle customer support tickets.

questions.question: Customer service core goal?

options.A: Customers ke issues ko identify karke unhe politely, fast aur satisfactory solution provide karna
options.B: Only cutting costs by ignoring customer calls
options.C: Creating software database codes in IT department

questions.explanation: Customer service agents ka primary role customer expectations meet karna, brand trust maintain rakhna aur retention high rakhna hota hai.

questions.question: Customer interactions Empathy perspective?

options.A: Customer ki problem aur situational feelings ko unke perspective se understand karna aur validate karna
options.B: Offering customer discounts without solving their core problems
options.C: Arguing that company policies are always correct
options.D: Talking very fast so customer gets confused

questions.explanation: Empathy customer ko valued feel karati hai aur issue resolution time par support building block banati hai.

questions.question: Customer phone calls hold intervals?

options.A: Ask customer permission before hold, state hold reason, and check back every 45-60 seconds
options.B: Keep caller on silent hold for 20 minutes directly
options.C: Disconnect line if processing takes time

questions.explanation: Mute hold bina rules details update kare customer frustation ko high kar deta hai, regular updates satisfy client check limits.

questions.question: First Contact Resolution FCR metrics?

options.A: Customer issue ka first single call/chat session me hi fully resolve hona (zero follow-up sessions needed)
options.B: Calling customer daily for payments verification
options.C: Greeting the customer first before they speak

questions.explanation: High FCR operational cost reduce karta hai aur customer satisfaction levels instantly double up karta hai.

questions.question: LAST recovery steps Apologize first?

options.A: Apologize (sincere aur polite apology for inconvenience caused)
options.B: Action (immediate dispatch logs)
options.C: Attitude (strict posture checks)

questions.explanation: LAST framework (Listen, Apologize, Solve, Thank) customer recovery steps ka baseline guide mana jata hai.

questions.question: Live Chat canned templates speed?

options.A: Pre-written template text messages used to answer frequently asked questions quickly
options.B: Automated voice voicemail alerts
options.C: Spam promotional advertisements links

questions.explanation: Canned responses typing efforts save karti hain aur common queries (eg return policy, refund status) instant resolved karti hain.

questions.question: Customer loyalty metrics NPS promoter?

options.A: Likelihood of customers recommending company products to friends/colleagues (scores 0 to 10 scale)
options.B: Total website views per day
options.C: Average call durations minutes count

questions.explanation: NPS loyalty metric hai. Promoters (9-10 score), Passives (7-8 score) aur Detractors (0-6 score) categorize karta hai.

questions.question: Abusive callers agent supervisor boundaries?

options.A: Stay calm, do not raise voice, politely set boundaries ('I want to help you, but please avoid abusive language'), and escalate to supervisor if behavior continues
options.B: Shout back using similar abusive words to protect self respect
options.C: Disconnect call instantly without warning statements
options.D: Agree to all fake demands immediately out of fear

questions.explanation: Calm and professional tone escalations prevent situations from turning worse, establishing service ethics boundaries.

questions.question: CRM systems customer interaction tickets?

options.A: Customer interaction history, tickets tracking aur purchase profiles details update and store karna
options.B: Calculating local office electricity taxes
options.C: Managing staff attendance sheet logs

questions.explanation: Customer Relationship Management (CRM) databases agents ko client context logs check karne me help karte hain during repeat runs.
